questions.question: In a (4, 7) threshold signature system, what is the minimum number of nodes required to create a valid signature?
In threshold signature schemes, the complete private key is temporarily reconstructed in memory during the signing process.
What is the primary purpose of Multi-Party Computation (MPC) in threshold signatures?
options: To speed up the signing process
To allow nodes to jointly compute signatures while keeping their key shares private
To reduce the number of nodes needed
questions.correctAnswer: To allow nodes to jointly compute signatures while keeping their key shares private

questions.question: A partial signature generated by a single node is ______ on its own and cannot be used to authorize anything.
How does a threshold signature appear to external observers on the blockchain?
options: As multiple signatures from different nodes
As a special threshold signature format
As one normal-looking signature indistinguishable from traditional signatures
questions.correctAnswer: As one normal-looking signature indistinguishable from traditional signatures

questions.question: If an attacker steals one key share from a (5, 9) threshold system, they can forge signatures.
